title: Create EventBridge Scheduler Schedules Using AWS CLI
description: Use AWS CLI to create Amazon EventBridge Scheduler schedules with rate and cron expressions targeting AWS Lambda

introBox.headline: How it works
text: This snippet demonstrates how to create Amazon EventBridge Scheduler schedules using the AWS CLI `aws scheduler create-schedule` command with rate and cron expressions, targeting AWS Lambda

snippets.title: Copy the commands on your CLI and replace the LAMBDA_ARN and the EVENTBRIDGE_ROLE_ARN. Modidy the rate/cron expressions as desired
